description: A candid event/documentary photograph from the DHS Career Expo, with no designed overlay graphics (any text in frame is part of physical signage/banners at the event). A young man in a navy suit stands with his back partly to the camera talking to a woman behind a recruiting table; she wears a gray 'Cybersecurity Service' T-shirt. The booth is draped in a black tablecloth printed in white with 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY / CYBERSECURITY SERVICE,' and a green vertical banner behind her repeats the DHS Cybersecurity Service branding. The table holds giveaway items, brochures, hand sanitizer, and a QR-code sign; blue pipe-and-drape and convention-hall lighting are visible, with other attendees in the background. Visual style: straightforward press/recruitment event photography (natural lighting, no graphic treatment). Although it depicts agency branding, the image itself is a plain candid photo rather than a designed meme/poster. Messaging/intent: documents and promotes DHS recruitment/hiring activity. Target audience: prospective job applicants and the public.
notable_text: (physical signage only) U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY / CYBERSECURITY SERVICE
